title: Cochleanthes digitata
taxonomy: Cochleanthes digitata is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This classification places Cochleanthes digitata as a member of the orchid family, which comprises one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. At the genus level, Cochleanthes digitata is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae. The species Cochleanthes digitata is native to South America, specifically within the tropical regions of Brazil and other surrounding countries. It is characterized by its unique and delicate appearance, with finger-like structures giving it its species name, digitata.
